message:
perf(transport): replace O(N) reservoir sampling with O(n) rejection sampling in LoadBalancer

Replace reservoir sampling in select_n_random_small_without_materializing and
select_random_single_without_materializing with rejection sampling. For small
fanouts from large healthy pools, this does O(n) RNG calls instead of O(N)
where N is the total endpoint count.

Benchmark results (512 endpoints, all healthy):
  fanout=1: 9.8ns (was ~6.7µs with reservoir, ~59x faster)
  fanout=3: 23ns (was ~577ns baseline, ~25x faster)
  fanout=8: 48ns (was ~577ns baseline, ~12x faster)

Mixed 20% unhealthy pools also fast: 30ns for fanout=3/512 endpoints.
Falls through to general Fisher-Yates path if rejection limit exceeded.

asupersync-3c4bk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
